closing.summary: Mackerel has a genuinely strong overall case, especially high satiety protein source and complete protein delivery is reliable. the downsides are there, but fat quality can go sideways fast and cost and storage can be a pain do not outweigh the upside. best when you want efficient protein and can accept the category tradeoffs that come with it.
